title: ASMR Brainrot Engine
subtitle: Whispered Nonsense for the Algorithmically Overstimulated
philosophy: Quality-focused content that soothes and confuses in equal measure. Not demographic specific—just vibes.
listening_guidelines: Best experienced at 3 AM with noise-canceling headphones
Adjust brainrot coefficient to desired confusion level
Close your eyes and let the algorithm take over
Side effects may include: profound calm, spiritual questioning, sudden urge to touch grass
creator_notes: We started this as a joke. Then we realized people actually fall asleep to this. Now it's art.
disclaimer: Entertainment only. Not responsible for existential awakenings or sudden clarity about your life choices.
